message:
🌱 Add fluent-bit: `aws` plugin fails to retrieve IMDSv2 token to get metadata mission (#1786)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluent-bit-7282-aws-plugin-fails-to-retrieve-imdsv2-token-to-get-metadata-in-2-1",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluent-bit: `aws` plugin fails to retrieve IMDSv2 token to get metadata in >= 2.1.0",
+    "description": "`aws` plugin fails to retrieve IMDSv2 token to get metadata in >= 2.1.0. This issue affects 14+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify fluent-bit troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluent-bit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit\n```\nThe `aws` plugin fails to get IMDSv2 token.\n\n**To Reproduce**\nEnable the `aws` plugin and force the use of IMDSv2 on the EC2 instance.\n\nThe `aws` plugin should be able to obtain IMDS metadata without error."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for `aws` plugin fails to retrieve IMDSv2 token to get metadata…",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [debug] [imds] using IMDSv2\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [upstream] get new connection for 169.254.169.254:80, net setup:\nnet.connect_timeout        = 1 seconds\nnet.source_address         = any\nnet.keepalive              = disabled\nnet.keepalive_idle_timeout = 30 seconds\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [net] connection #46 in process to 169.254.169.254:80\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [io] connection OK\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [debug] [http_client] not using http_proxy for header\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [error] [aws_client] failed to add header to request\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm `aws` plugin fails to retrieve IMDSv2 token to… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/7282",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [debug] [imds] using IMDSv2\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [upstream] get new connection for 192.0.2.1:80, net setup:\nnet.connect_timeout        = 1 seconds\nnet.source_address         = any\nnet.keepalive              = disabled\nnet.keepalive_idle_timeout = 30 seconds\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [net] connection #46 in process to 192.0.2.1:80\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [io] connection OK\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [debug] [http_client] not using http_proxy for header\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [error] [aws_client] failed to add header to request\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [trace] [upstream] destroy connection #46 to 192.0.2.1:80\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [ warn] [imds] failed to retrieve metadata\n[2023/04/27 16:07:03] [error] [filter:aws:aws.1] Failed to get instanc",
+        "[2023/04/27 18:33:27] [debug] [imds] using IMDSv2 with INVALID_TOKEN = 0\n[2023/04/27 18:33:27] [debug] [http_client] not using http_proxy for header\n[2023/04/27 18:33:27] [error] [http_client] length is too small: key:24 val:0\n[2023/04/27 18:33:27] [error] [aws_client] failed to add dynamic header, X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: <REDACTED>, to request\n[2023/04/27 18:33:27] [ warn] [imds] failed to retrieve metadata\n[2023/04/27 18:33:27] [error] [filter:aws:aws.1] Failed to get instance ID"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluent-bit",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluent-bit"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/7282",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-27T06:33:40.726Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
